thoughts_kodytasks2516260418040123labelp.content: The local status.json file may lag behind GitHub label state if the pipeline writes to GitHub before updating status.json — always use status.json to determine what SHOULD be present, and gh issue vie

conventions_kody_pipeline_labels_4976169.content: Lifecycle labels are mutually exclusive per stage (kody:planning, kody:building, etc.) — assert the current stage label is present AND future-stage labels are absent.

conventions_kody_pipeline_labels_4976186.content: Complexity labels (kody:low/medium/high) persist across all pipeline stages and must be asserted as always-present throughout.

facts_kody_pipeline_testing_497620104742.content: The test reads current stage from status.json, not from the labels themselves — status.json is the source of truth for which stage label should be active.
